company: Lekkerland SE (Ein Unternehmen der REWE Group)
title: UX Research & Analytics Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Qualitative & quantitative user research (planning, execution, evaluation)
Dashboard & KPI report creation for stakeholders
Cross-functional collaboration (UX/UI, PM, Tech, Marketing, Sales)
matched_skills: Voice-of-customer / user research (Hapag-Lloyd: customer data and user research analysis)
KPI dashboards & reporting (Power BI PL-300 certified, KPI dashboards, ROI reporting)
Cross-functional collaboration (product, engineering, marketing, C-suite interface at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd)
Data-driven insights & recommendations (structured performance summaries, sprint review updates)
Stakeholder communication of complex findings (C-level reporting, executive-ready insights)
missing_skills: A/B testing & experiment analysis (no explicit mention in CV)
UX research repository / continuous insights pipeline setup
core_responsibilities: Plan, conduct, and evaluate qualitative and quantitative research formats (interviews, usability tests) to identify user needs, pain points, and optimization opportunities along the customer journey
Create personas, journey maps, insight reports, and actionable recommendations for the product team
Establish a continuous customer insights pipeline and build a research repository
Analyze user behavior in the shop using tools such as Google Analytics or Hotjar and produce dashboards and KPI reports for internal stakeholders
Support A/B tests and experiment analyses to derive conversion, navigation, and feature optimizations
recommended_emphasis: Highlight voice-of-customer research experience at Hapag-Lloyd — frame it as structured user research including data collection, synthesis, and stakeholder reporting
Lead with Power BI / KPI dashboard expertise as a proxy for analytics tooling; mention willingness and ability to transfer skills to Google Analytics and Hotjar
Emphasize cross-functional stakeholder management across Product, Tech, Marketing, and Sales — directly mirrors the JD collaboration requirement
Surface any A/B test or experiment analysis exposure (even academic or project-based) to partially close the gap
Stress customer journey thinking and insight-to-action translation (converting research into recommendations) — central to the role
If applicable, mention any persona or journey map work from university consulting projects (VfB Stuttgart impact framework could be framed as a structured insights methodology)
